questions.question: What exactly was Lucy advertising when she became inebriated?
Invented in 1966, this substitute for whipped cream became an instant success with homemakers.
Finish the chorus to the Youngbloods 1967 hit "Get Together": "Come on people now __________."
questions.answer: "Smile on your brother, Everybody get together, Try to love one another right now."

questions.question: In 1955, the opening of this magical family-friendly venue was seen on TV by an estimated 70 million people.
Who is famous for his phrase "What's up, Doc?"
